target_path: core adds pure runtime authority references, not durable registration truth

operations translates pinned activity context plus registered runtime authority into RuntimeEffectRequest authority reference/material

recommended_amendments.note: Explicitly decide whether RuntimeEffectRequest gets authority_ref at request level or runtime/node material level.
Reuse RegisteredImagePullAuthority data-engineering pattern, but keep Docker daemon authority distinct from OCI pull authority.
Move dispatcher composition toward operations bootstrap, but keep concrete SDK imports out of service/store/coordinator modules.
